name: Mailu API
description: Mailu is a Docker-based full-featured mail server. The RESTful admin API allows managing domains, users, aliases, relays, and other mail server configuration. The API is protected by an API token configured via mailu.env. Swagger spec is available at /api/v1/swagger.json on running instances.
